author: David (Team Lead)
note: Quick bypass hack to make the demo work for Berlin. Do NOT copy this pattern — we're accepting debt here because WebView state-loss is a platform bug we can't fix in 48 hours. Proper PKCE fix is Task 415 in Q3. Ping Yossi before touching auth.js.

author: Maya (Security)
note: Reviewed and approved the bypass under these conditions only: redirect_uri is validated server-side, bypass path is logged to Datadog, and Task 415 ships before Android user base grows. Do NOT extend this to Microsoft SSO or web paths. Security review scheduled July 2026.

author: Yossi (Developer)
note: Both handleOAuthCallback and refreshAccessToken depend on the same sessionStorage flag. If you change one, you must update the other — they'll fall out of sync and you'll get either a loop or broken token refresh. Tested on S24, Pixel 8, Pixel 7.

author: Sarah (PM)
note: This hotfix was a P0 — 23% of Android users couldn't log in at all. Conference demo passed. Task 415 and 421 are locked into Q3 so this doesn't become permanent. If the Q3 timeline slips, escalate immediately.
